source_context:
Conceptual diagram: stratified ontology of Critical Realism. THREE NESTED CONCENTRIC circles (subset containment), largest outside to smallest inside.
1. Outermost largest = the Real (실재적 층위, the real); label inside band: 구조 · 생성기제.
2. Middle, inside the Real = the Actual (현실적 층위, the actual); label: 발생한 사건.
3. Innermost smallest = the Empirical (경험적 층위, the empirical); label: 관측된 사건.
Relation: 실재적 ⊇ 현실적 ⊇ 경험적. Message: observed is only a subset of reality.
One generative arrow from outside to inside: 생성기제 → 사건 → 관측.
Style: flat, minimal, academic. Navy #1f3a5f outer, teal #2f7d95 inner. No 3D, no shadows. Korean labels with English in parentheses, readable. No abduction terms.
communicative_intent: 비판적 실재론의 층화된 존재론: 실재적 ⊇ 현실적 ⊇ 경험적 동심 포함관계와 생성기제 → 사건 → 관측의 발생 방향.
